subject: Follow-up: pre-seed allocation
snippet: Great chatting earlier — wanted to confirm you're still open to a small allocation in the round. Can you send over the final SAFE details this week?
body:
Hi Danielle,

Great chatting earlier — wanted to confirm you're still open to a small allocation in the round. Can you send over the final SAFE details this week? Happy to move quickly on our end.

Best,
Priya

subject: New posts from 4 writers you follow
snippet: This week in your inbox: essays on agent design, a market teardown, and two product notes.
body: You're receiving this because you follow these publications. This week: essays on agent design, a market teardown, and two product notes. Manage your subscriptions any time.

subject: Q3 planning: need your call on the owner
snippet: We're stuck on who owns the shipping sequence. Can you make the call before Friday's review?
body:
Danielle — we're stuck on who owns the shipping sequence for Q3. Two candidates, both stretched. Can you make the call before Friday's review so we can lock the plan?

Thanks,
Marcus
